label: Transparent tanager plumage motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Tanager transparent motif chroma-key source for a design-system catalog
Primary request: Create only an isolated tanager-plumage motif on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparency removal.
Subject: A refined tropical tanager plumage motif combining a scarlet chest feather fan, glossy black wing mask, electric blue shoulder feather, and emerald green tropical accent feather; accurate bird feather barbs, crisp layered silhouette, subtle iridescence, premium vivid catalog system feel.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full feather cluster silhouette without cropping; no environment, no props, no text.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light preserving scarlet, black, blue, and green plumage detail, crisp edges, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff only. One uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject; no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no tropical forest background, no whole bird, no other animals, no flowers, no watermark, no text, no random brand names.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 light-mode product design-system board for "Morphous Tanager" / "Tanager" using the motif of tropical tanager plumage.
Visual identity: vivid catalog system, scarlet chest plumage surfaces, glossy black wing-mask contrast, electric blue shoulder accents, emerald green tropical forest highlights, warm ivory light surfaces, precise editorial product-system polish.
Required board sections with readable labels: palette tokens, typography with English and Japanese guidance, component library, navigation/sidebar, dashboard analytics with charts, data table, forms and filters, status badges and alerts, command/search, tabs, switches, checkboxes, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture and icon guidance.
UI language: 8px grid, rounded rectangles radius 8px or less, feather-rib dividers, small plumage-swatch accents, ivory catalog cards, scarlet primary buttons, black high-contrast text, blue focus rings, green success states, dashboard/table/form/status/navigation sections clearly visible.
Text constraints: use clean readable labels only, no random brand names, no watermark, no lorem ipsum, no misspellings; labels should be generic product UI terms such as Overview, Forest Index, Health, Status, Form, Table, Revenue, Conversion, Active, Pending.
Palette names visible: Scarlet Crest #ef2f2f, Wing Black #151515, Canopy Blue #1f6eea, Tanager Green #17a65a, Ivory Plume #fff9ed, Moss Mist #dcebd7, Ember Focus #ff5a3d, Deep Canopy #0f241b, Leaf Vein #6f8f57.
Constraints: no bird photo background, no other animals, no generic purple/blue gradient kit, no neon-only palette, no stock brand logos, no random brand names, no watermark.
